• State-of-the-art algorithms and techniques currently used to classify software-related text (e.g., commit messages, bug reports, requirements documents).

To keep the focus on the information rather than flashy gimmicks, I’m looking for an editor who can shape a clear, balanced vertical reel each time—no hyper-fast montages or heavy VFX, just clean pacing, tight storytelling and smart use of text or graphics where it genuinely helps the viewer understand the concept.

The goal is to eliminate the manual steps I now take when updating, cleansing, and distributing spreadsheet data across teams.

• A flow that triggers when a source workbook is updated, copies the fresh data into a structured table, and applies predefined formatting and validation rules.

full_description:
We are looking for an experienced affiliate manager to help grow a global affiliate network by recruiting, onboarding, activating, and supporting publishers, affiliates, media buyers, influencers, content creators, coupon partners, review sites, communities, and partner networks. The selected candidate will start with a three-month trial on a monthly retainer basis; thereafter, based on their performance, we will increase the retainer fee to support a continued long-term relationship.

The main goal of this role is to increase the number of active publishers, improve affiliate engagement, support campaign adoption, and help the network start generating revenue faster through strong affiliate recruitment and activation.

This is a hands-on role. We are not looking for someone who only manages basic communication. We need someone proactive, fast, organized, commercially sharp, and highly focused on results.

Key responsibilities
Affiliate recruitment

You will be responsible for identifying, approaching, and recruiting relevant affiliates and publishers across global markets.

Tasks include:

Researching potential publishers, affiliates, influencers, bloggers, media buyers, coupon sites, cashback sites, comparison sites, review sites, content creators, niche communities, and partner networks
Building targeted affiliate prospect lists by niche, GEO, traffic type, audience, and promotion method
Recruiting affiliates across categories such as eCommerce, SaaS, finance, health, beauty, travel, education, lifestyle, home, B2B, lead generation, and other suitable verticals
Creating personalized outreach messages
Sending outreach and follow-up messages
Explaining the value of joining the network
Encouraging affiliates to register and complete onboarding
Identifying high-potential partners in the USA, Europe, MENA, APAC, India, and other global markets
Affiliate activation

Recruiting affiliates is only the first step. The selected candidate must be strong at activating publishers and helping them start promoting campaigns.

Tasks include:

Communicating with newly joined publishers quickly
Helping affiliates choose suitable campaigns based on niche, traffic source, audience, and GEO
Guiding publishers on how to find offers, generate tracking links, use Smartlinks, and start promotions
Following up with inactive affiliates and encouraging them to launch campaigns
Sharing campaign recommendations with publishers
Helping affiliates understand payouts, campaign objectives, GEO targeting, approved offers, featured offers, deep links, Smartlinks, coupon codes, tracking links, postbacks, and reporting
Increasing the number of active and revenue-generating affiliates
Affiliate communication and support

Fast response time is very important for this role.

Responsibilities include:

Responding to affiliate emails and messages as quickly as possible
Answering affiliate questions clearly and professionally
Supporting affiliates with campaign selection, tracking links, approvals, payouts, postbacks, coupons, and reporting
Creating onboarding messages, activation emails, follow-up sequences, and campaign update messages
Sending regular updates about featured campaigns, approved offers, Smartlinks, and promotional opportunities
Keeping publishers engaged, informed, and motivated
Coming up with innovative ways to communicate with affiliates and improve activation
Merchant and partner network support

You will also help maintain strong relationships with merchants, advertisers, and partner networks.

Tasks include:

Communicating professionally with advertisers, merchants, and partner networks
Following up on campaign approvals, payout details, promotional assets, coupons, and offer information
Coordinating between publishers and merchant-side teams where required
Helping resolve basic partner-side questions
Supporting smooth communication between publishers, merchants, partner networks, and internal teams
Affiliate tracking and platform knowledge

The candidate should understand affiliate marketing technology and be comfortable explaining basic tracking concepts to publishers.

You should understand:

Affiliate tracking links
Deep links
Smartlinks
Postback URLs
Click ID tracking
Macros and tracking parameters
Sub-publisher tracking
Impression pixels
Coupon codes
Campaign preview URLs
GEO targeting
Device and operating system targeting
Conversion tracking
Affiliate dashboards and reporting
Campaign approvals
CPA, CPL, CPS, RevShare, and pay-per-call models
Common publisher traffic types and promotional methods

You do not need to be a developer, but you must be comfortable understanding and explaining affiliate links, Smartlinks, postbacks, coupons, tracking, and reporting.

Required skills

The ideal candidate should have:

Experience in affiliate marketing, affiliate management, publisher recruitment, partner management, or performance marketing
Strong understanding of affiliate networks and publisher relationships
Proven ability to recruit and activate affiliates
Excellent written English communication skills
Fast email and message response habits
Strong follow-up skills
Good research skills
Ability to manage multiple affiliate conversations at the same time
Ability to recommend campaigns based on publisher niche, GEO, and traffic type
Understanding of affiliate links, Smartlinks, deep links, postbacks, coupons, tracking, and reporting
Ability to work independently
Strong ownership and execution mindset
Professional attitude with affiliates, merchants, advertisers, and partner networks
Preferred experience

Experience with any of the following will be a strong advantage:

Affiliate networks
CPA networks
Performance marketing agencies
Publisher recruitment teams
Advertiser affiliate programs
Sub-affiliate networks
Influencer or creator partnerships
Coupon, cashback, content, comparison, review, loyalty, email, paid media, and niche publishers
Global affiliate recruitment across the USA, Europe, MENA, APAC, India, and other international markets

Experience with platforms such as Trackier, Impact, Awin, CJ, Rakuten Advertising, Partnerize, Everflow, HasOffers, Tune, Voluum, CAKE, or similar tools will be helpful.

Weekly deliverables

The selected candidate should be able to deliver weekly progress, including:

New affiliate prospect research
Outreach to potential publishers and affiliates
Follow-ups with interested affiliates
Activation communication with newly joined or inactive publishers
Campaign recommendations to relevant affiliates
Support for affiliate questions and issues
Merchant or partner network coordination where required
Weekly report showing outreach, responses, sign-ups, activations, and next steps

Suggested weekly minimums:

100 to 200 new affiliate prospects researched
50 to 100 affiliate outreach messages sent
50 to 100 follow-up messages sent
Newly registered affiliates contacted within the shortest possible time
Inactive affiliates followed up with regularly
1 weekly performance and activity report submitted
Success metrics

Success will be measured by:

Number of relevant affiliates recruited
Number of affiliates activated
Number of affiliates generating tracking links
Number of affiliates promoting campaigns
Response rate from outreach
Affiliate engagement rate
Quality of affiliate communication
Speed of response to affiliate questions
Campaign adoption by publishers
Revenue-generating affiliate growth
Work style required

We are looking for someone who is:

Proactive
Fast in communication
Organized
Relationship-driven
Strong in written English
Comfortable with outreach
Good at follow-ups
Commercially sharp
Detail-oriented
Comfortable with affiliate tracking tools
Results-focused
Able to work without constant supervision
What we do not want

Please do not apply if you:

Cannot respond quickly
Are not comfortable with outreach
Do not understand affiliate marketing basics
Cannot manage follow-ups
Only want passive admin work
Cannot work independently
Do not understand affiliate links or tracking concepts
Application questions

Please answer the following when applying:

What is your experience in affiliate recruitment or affiliate management?
Have you worked with affiliate networks, CPA networks, or advertiser affiliate programs?
Which affiliate platforms or tracking systems have you used?
Do you understand affiliate links, Smartlinks, deep links, postbacks, macros, and coupon tracking?
How would you recruit and activate affiliates for a growing affiliate network?
Which GEOs and industries have you worked with?
How quickly can you respond to affiliate emails or messages during working hours?
Can you share examples of affiliate outreach, activation, or partner communication work you have handled?
How many affiliates can you research and contact weekly?
What would your first 30-day plan look like?
Final note

We are looking for a serious affiliate manager who can take ownership of publisher recruitment, affiliate activation, partner communication, and campaign support.

The right person should be able to move fast, communicate professionally, recruit relevant affiliates, activate publishers, support partners, and help build a strong global affiliate network.

full_description:
I need a clean, responsive e-commerce site focused exclusively on selling downloadable digital products. The core of the build is a solid user account management system so buyers can register, sign in, track their purchases, and re-download files whenever they need.

Here is what I have in mind:

• Front-end: modern HTML5, semantic CSS3, and unobtrusive JavaScript for smooth interaction on desktop and mobile. 
• Back-end: PHP with MySQL is fine, but I am open to a Firebase implementation if that speeds development and simplifies authentication. 
• Digital product handling: after checkout the file must appear instantly in the customer’s dashboard and be protected from public access. 
• Admin area: upload new products, set pricing, view basic sales stats, and manage users. 
• Security & performance basics: input validation, prepared statements / parameterized queries, and lazy loading where appropriate. 

Deliverables
1. Full source code and database/export scripts. 
2. A short read-me explaining local setup and deployment on a standard shared host (and, if you choose Firebase, the necessary project settings). 
3. Test data: at least one sample product and a demo user account so I can verify the flow.

Acceptance criteria
– New users can register, log in, and update their profile. 
– Logged-in users can purchase a digital product and immediately find it in “My Downloads.” 
– Direct URL access to files without authentication is blocked. 
– Admin can create, edit, or retire a product from the dashboard. 

If you have a reusable template or framework that speeds things up while keeping code readable, feel free to suggest it. Let me know your preferred stack, an estimated timeline, and any clarifying questions you have.

full_description:
My new casual-dress label needs a crisp, modern logo that captures an easy-going yet stylish vibe. 

Style 
• Overall look: clean, contemporary lines with just enough personality to feel approachable rather than high-fashion formal. 
• Colour choices are open, though a palette that feels fresh and wearable (think muted pastels or a single bold accent) will probably suit the brand best. Feel free to propose options.

Concept guidance 
A subtle dress silhouette, smart negative space, or expressive lettering could all work—as long as the result remains unmistakably modern and instantly readable at small sizes (web favicons, garment labels, swing tags). I’m flexible on icon vs. typography so long as the final mark feels balanced and scales well.

Deliverables 
1. Primary logo in fully editable vector format (.ai or .eps) 
2. High-resolution transparent PNG (RGB) 
3. One-colour and reverse variants 
4. Brief rationale explaining typography, colour and icon decisions

Acceptance criteria 
• Vector curves are clean, no unnecessary anchor points 
• Text converted to outlines or accompanied by the font files/license info 
• Colours defined in RGB, CMYK and Hex so production across digital and print is seamless

full_description:
Senior Flutter & Node.js Developer Needed for Social Video Platform Customization, Backend Migration & Deployment

Project Overview

We are looking for an experienced and professional Flutter + Node.js developer to customize, improve, secure, and deploy an existing social video platform that we will purchase as a complete source code package.

This is NOT a project built from scratch.

The application, backend, and admin panel already exist. The primary objective is to transform the existing codebase into a fully customized, production-ready platform under our own branding, infrastructure, and ownership.

This is a defined project with a fixed scope and budget constraints.

⸻

Current Status

The source code package already includes:

* Flutter mobile application
* Node.js backend
* Admin panel
* User management
* Video feed functionality
* Content upload functionality
* Social platform features

The selected developer will be responsible for improving, customizing, securing, and deploying the platform.

⸻

Main Responsibilities

1. Branding & UI Customization

* Implement our logo and branding throughout the platform
* Apply our visual identity and design direction
* Improve the overall appearance and user experience
* Create a polished and professional look and feel
* Ensure consistency across:
 * iOS App
 * Android App
 * Admin Dashboard

⸻

2. Backend Migration & Refactoring

The backend must be reviewed, refactored, and migrated to infrastructure fully controlled by us.

Responsibilities include:

* Refactor existing Node.js backend
* Remove unnecessary dependencies where required
* Improve architecture and performance
* Review security and authentication systems
* Optimize APIs and database performance
* Configure deployment under our own infrastructure and accounts
* Ensure full ownership and control of backend systems

⸻

3. Video Platform Improvements

Improve the overall video platform experience:

* Improve camera functionality and recording stability
* Improve upload performance
* Improve feed performance and responsiveness
* Improve content loading speed
* Improve overall platform stability

⸻

4. Content Creation Studio

Create a more professional upload and content creation experience.

The upload studio should support:

* Video uploads
* Photo uploads
* Video trimming
* Basic editing tools
* Filters and enhancements where appropriate
* User-friendly content publishing workflow

The goal is to create a polished creator experience.

⸻

5. Live Streaming Improvements

Review and improve live streaming functionality.

This may include:

* Performance improvements
* Stability improvements
* Better user experience
* Better stream management functionality

⸻

6. Advertising & Monetization

Improve advertising integration throughout the platform.

Requirements include:

* Support for in-feed video advertisements
* Smooth advertisement placement between content feeds
* Optimized user experience
* Scalable advertising architecture

⸻

7. New Feature – Challenge System

We want to introduce a custom engagement feature:

* Users can challenge other users
* Challenges may involve engagement metrics such as views, likes, or interactions
* Winners may receive increased visibility or promotional benefits

This feature requires both frontend and backend implementation.

⸻

8. App Store & Google Play Deployment

The selected developer will be responsible for:

* Preparing production builds
* Resolving build issues
* Configuring signing and certificates
* Deploying to:
 * Apple App Store
 * Google Play Store
* Assisting with review-related fixes if required

⸻

Requirements

* Strong Flutter experience
* Strong Node.js experience
* Experience with social media platforms
* Experience with video applications
* Experience with backend architecture and API design
* Experience deploying apps to App Store and Google Play
* Ability to work with existing codebases professionally

⸻

Important Notes

* This is an existing platform, not a new build
* We are looking for quality work and professional execution
* Clean architecture and scalability are important
* Good communication is required
* Regular progress updates are expected

⸻

Application Instructions

To confirm that you have fully read this project description, please begin your proposal with the following phrase:

“BLUE SKY PROJECT”

Applications that do not include this phrase may not be reviewed.

Please also include:

* Relevant project examples
* Timeline estimate
* Cost estimate
* Suggested improvements or recommendations

Thank you.

full_description:
Senior Unity 6 Developer / Game Development Team Needed for Large-Scale Multiplayer Project

Project Overview

We are seeking an experienced Unity 6 developer or development team to help build an ambitious large-scale multiplayer game for iOS and Android.

The project combines open-world gameplay, multiplayer systems, progression mechanics, dynamic events, AI-driven systems, backend-connected features, and live-service functionality.

At this stage, we are intentionally keeping specific gameplay concepts confidential. Full project details will be shared with shortlisted candidates during the interview process.

We are looking for developers who have experience building scalable game systems and who can contribute to both architecture and implementation.

⸻

Requirements

Essential Experience

* Unity 6
* C#
* Multiplayer game development
* Mobile game development (iOS and Android)
* Backend integration
* Database systems
* Performance optimization
* Game architecture and system design

Preferred Experience

* Open-world environments
* Live-service games
* Dedicated servers
* Real-time networking
* AI systems
* Player progression systems
* Character systems
* Economy systems
* Cross-platform development

⸻

Scope of Work

The selected developer/team will assist with:

* Core gameplay systems
* Multiplayer architecture
* Character systems
* World systems
* Event systems
* Economy systems
* Backend services
* Data synchronization
* Live-service infrastructure
* Mobile optimization
* Scalability planning

⸻

Admin Platform Requirements

The project requires a professional web-based administration platform that allows game operators to manage and control the game environment without requiring application updates for every change.

The administration platform should include:

Player Management

* Search players
* View player profiles
* Edit player information
* Suspend players
* Ban players
* Remove players
* Restore accounts
* Manage player inventory
* Manage player progression

Reward Management

* Grant rewards
* Distribute in-game currency
* Distribute resources
* Distribute items
* Grant event rewards
* Create compensation packages

Content Management

* Add new content
* Activate content
* Deactivate content
* Schedule content releases
* Configure live events
* Configure seasonal content

Economy Management

* Manage currency values
* Adjust rewards
* Adjust pricing
* Configure economic parameters
* Monitor economic activity

Event Management

* Create events
* Schedule events
* Launch live events
* Configure event rewards
* Manage event participation

Tournament Management

* Create tournaments
* Schedule tournaments
* Configure tournament rules
* Assign rewards
* Track standings
* Publish results

Analytics Dashboard

* Active users
* Retention metrics
* Revenue metrics
* Engagement metrics
* Event performance
* System monitoring

Communication Tools

* Send announcements
* Send notifications
* Broadcast messages
* Manage community alerts

Security & Audit

* Role-based permissions
* Admin access levels
* Action logging
* Audit history
* Security controls

⸻

What We Need From Applicants

Please include:

1. Portfolio
2. Relevant Unity projects
3. Multiplayer experience
4. Team size (if applicable)
5. Availability
6. Hourly rate
7. Previous live-service or multiplayer projects

⸻

Important

Certain systems, mechanics, and unique gameplay features are confidential and will only be discussed with serious candidates during interviews.

We are seeking long-term collaboration with highly skilled professionals capable of building a scalable commercial product.

To confirm that you have read this posting, begin your proposal with:

“VALHALLA”

full_description:
## Power BI Project Request – Strait of Hormuz Impact Dashboard

I am looking for a complete Power BI project for a university jury presentation.

### Project Topic

**Strait of Hormuz Impact Dashboard**

The project should analyze the importance of the Strait of Hormuz in global energy markets and the potential impact of disruptions on oil prices, energy security, and regional vulnerability.

This is a highly relevant and current geopolitical topic.

### Main Research Question

**How could disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz impact global oil markets, energy security, and regional vulnerability over time?**

### Sub-Questions

1. How have global oil prices evolved over time?
2. What percentage of global oil trade passes through the Strait of Hormuz?
3. Which countries and regions are most dependent on oil transported through the Strait of Hormuz?
4. How have geopolitical tensions in the region historically affected oil prices and energy markets?
5. Which countries and regions face the highest risk if the Strait of Hormuz is disrupted or closed?

### Requirements

The project must be built entirely in Power BI.

Please use:

* Power Query for data cleaning and transformation
* Proper data modeling (star schema if applicable)
* DAX measures and KPIs
* Time-series analysis
* Interactive dashboard design

### Deliverables

#### 1. Power BI File (.pbix)

Must include:

* Data cleaning in Power Query
* Data quality checks
* Data model
* DAX measures
* KPIs
* Time-series analysis
* Interactive dashboard

#### 2. Dashboard Pages

At minimum:

**Page 1 – Executive Overview**

* Key KPIs
* Global impact summary
* Oil market overview
* Regional risk indicators

**Page 2 – Time-Series Analysis**

* Oil price trends
* Historical events and impact
* Forecasting
* Trend analysis

**Page 3 – Regional Vulnerability Analysis**

* Maps
* Regional dependency analysis
* Risk assessment
* Country comparisons

#### 3. PowerPoint Presentation

A professional 20-minute presentation including:

* Introduction
* Research questions
* Dataset overview
* Data cleaning process
* Data model
* DAX measures
* Dashboard walkthrough
* Key findings
* Recommendations
* Conclusion
* Q&A preparation

#### 4. Documentation

A short document explaining:

* Why the datasets were selected
* Data cleaning steps
* Analysis techniques used
* Key insights
* Answers to the research questions

### Dataset Requirements

Please use reliable public sources such as:

* World Bank
* U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA)
* International Energy Agency (IEA)
* IMF
* Our World in Data
* BP Statistical Review
* Other reputable public datasets

The datasets must contain a time component and enough historical data to support meaningful trend and time-series analysis.

### Goal

The goal is not to create an overly academic project.

The goal is to create a professional, business-oriented Power BI dashboard that demonstrates:

* Power Query skills
* Data modeling
* DAX
* Time intelligence
* Dashboard design
* Business storytelling

PROJECT: THE GEORGE INN OUNDLE – MENU DESIGN

I need a professional tri-fold (3-panel foldable) menu design created in Canva for The George Inn, Oundle.

The design should be fully editable in Canva so that we can easily update prices, add or remove products, and print new copies in the future without requiring further design work.

1. Main Drinks Menu (Tri-Fold)
Draught Beer & Cider
Bottled Beer & Cider
Gin
Vodka
Rum

Brandy & Cognac

Soft Drinks
Mixers
Juices

White Wines
Rosé Wines
Red Wines
Premium Wines
Sparkling Wines

Port

Mocktails

I need a small, clean application—built with a mix of Java and Python—that focuses solely on one core task: creating discount coupons. The generator must rely on customizable templates rather than random or sequential logic, because every brand I manage follows its own style guidelines. full_description:
I’m ready to build a full-stack intercity cab solution and need a team that can deliver four tightly-integrated components: 

1. Driver App (Android) 
 • Drivers receive trip notifications with all ride details the moment a dispatch manager assigns a job. 
 • Built-in navigation must optimise routes dynamically, taking toll plazas and state borders into account so the fare calculator can add toll tax, state tax and (where relevant) airport parking in real time. 
 • A clean earnings dashboard should let drivers track daily, weekly and monthly payouts and drill into Razorpay / Paytm settlement history.

2. Rider App (Android & iOS) 
 • Passengers can book or schedule rides ahead of time, pick vehicle category and view an upfront cost that already includes tolls, taxes and parking. 
 • Once the ride is active, they track their cab live on the map. 
 • After drop-off they rate the trip and review the driver.

3. Manual Dispatch Console 
 • Our operators manually assign trips, edit pickup or drop locations, override pricing when needed and push instant updates to driver and rider apps. 
 • The UI should surface live vehicle locations so dispatchers know which car to select.

4. Admin Panel 
 • Central hub to add, suspend or verify drivers and users. 
 • Real-time analytics: completed trips, revenue split, cancelled rides, average rating, heat maps. 
 • Full payment ledger with filters for Razorpay, Paytm and cash, plus export to CSV.

Additional integrations 
• SMS: we’ll provide API docs for our own gateway; system must trigger OTPs, status alerts and payment links. 
• Payment flows must follow Indian compliance rules (UPI intent flow, card tokenisation where required). 
• API layer needs to be modular so we can plug new gateways later without rewriting apps.

Deliverables 
• Source code for Android (Kotlin/Java) and iOS (Swift) apps, web admin and dispatch portals (React / Angular or similar). 
• REST / GraphQL backend with detailed API documentation. 
• Postman collection, environment files and a short video walk-through of key flows. 
• Deployment scripts for AWS or any mainstream cloud plus read-me on scaling and backups.

Acceptance Criteria 
✓ End-to-end booking to payment flow tested on sandbox Razorpay & Paytm. 
✓ Driver and rider see identical live location accuracy within 5 seconds. 
✓ Fare breakdown correctly itemises toll, state tax and airport parking. 
✓ Admin exports a payment report and it reconciles with gateway dashboard.

If your team has launched similar ride-hailing or logistics products and can meet these functional checkpoints, let’s discuss timelines and architecture choices.

full_description:
UI/UX Designer Needed for Premium Live Shopping & Auction Platform (Mobile + Web)
We’re building a next-generation live-shopping platform that combines the excitement of live auctions with the polish of a premium e-commerce experience.
The product will launch on:
iOS
Android
Fully responsive web
We’re looking for a highly skilled UI/UX designer who can craft a sophisticated, modern product experience that feels fast, immersive, and intuitive across every device.
What You’ll Design
Core Product Flows
Live-stream shopping experience
Real-time bidding & auction states
Countdown timers & sold indicators
Add-to-cart during live streams
Wallet & balance management
Checkout & order history
User profiles & seller dashboards
What We Want
We want the platform to feel:
Premium and modern
Elegant but highly usable
Energetic during live events
Clean and trustworthy during payments
The experience should feel fresh and memorable while still being intuitive for users familiar with live-commerce platforms like Whatnot.
Deliverables
1. High-Fidelity UI Designs
Complete mobile and desktop screens in Figma (preferred) or Sketch.
2. Design System
Including:
Typography
Color palette
Components
Buttons & form styles
Icons
Reusable layouts
Motion guidance
3. Interactive Prototype
Clickable prototype showing the full flow:
Discovery → Live Stream → Bidding → Cart → Checkout → Confirmation
4. Developer Handoff
Clean, organized files and documentation ready for implementation.
Ideal Candidate
You have experience designing:
E-commerce platforms
Live-streaming apps
Fintech/wallet experiences
Real-time interactive products
Strong motion and interaction design skills are a major plus.
To Apply
Please include:
Portfolio link
Relevant case studies
Examples of mobile + web products
A short note explaining how you’d give this platform its own distinctive visual identity
Bonus if you’ve worked on:
Live auction products
Marketplace apps
Creator economy platforms
Social commerce experiences
We’re looking for someone who can help shape not just screens, but the signature feel of the product.

full_description:
I already have a full set of Figma screens for a news-centric mobile application and now need those designs turned into a production-ready Flutter app. Every user will be required to sign up or log in before accessing content, so the authentication flow—registration, email/password login, forgotten password—is part of the build.

Core sections of the app mirror the Figma files: a scrollable home feed, category tabs, article detail pages that support rich text, embedded images, and reactive video players, plus a search view and basic user profile. The visual polish in Figma should carry over pixel-perfectly to both Android and iOS builds, including typography, spacing, and animation cues.

I’ll provide:
• Figma share link with all components and interaction notes 
• Brand colors, icon set, and any required fonts 
• API endpoints that return article and video data in JSON 

You’ll deliver:
• A clean, well-structured Flutter project (latest stable channel) using Dart best practices 
• Fully implemented authentication (Firebase Auth is preferred, but I’m open to similar solutions) 
• Integration of my REST endpoints for articles and videos, with graceful loading/error states 
• Working navigation, light/dark theme switch as shown in the designs, and responsive layouts for common phone sizes 
• A short README explaining project setup, key libraries, and how to build/run the app

Acceptance criteria: the compiled APK/IPA matches Figma screens at 1× zoom, all user flows are functional without crashes, and code passes flutter analyze with no errors.

If you’ve shipped Flutter apps that handle both articles and video, I’d love to see examples when we begin.

title_raw: مبرمج لتركيب وتعديل سكربت مهام واستثمار بشحن تلقائي رقمي ولوحة تحكم واحدة
title_clean: مبرمج لتركيب وتعديل سكربت مهام واستثمار بشحن تلقايي رقمي ولوحه تحكم واحده مرحبا، اريد انشاء موقع ويب للمهام اليوميه يعتم
cleaned_text: مبرمج لتركيب وتعديل سكربت مهام واستثمار بشحن تلقايي رقمي ولوحه تحكم واحده مرحبا، اريد انشاء موقع ويب للمهام اليوميه يعتمد علي باقات ومناصب محدده وهي c1 c2 b1 بربح يومي مخصص لكل منصب وبدون نظام احالات داخلي.تفاصيل العمل المطلوبه الشحن والسحب تلقايي بالكامل automated crypto عبر ربط الموقع ببوابه دفع عملات رقميه لتقبل عمله usdt، ليتعرف النظام تلقاييا علي وصول الاموال وتحديث الرصيد لشراء المناصب.قوانين السحب والرسوم مده السحب محدده الي 72 ساعه ورسوم خدمه السحب الافتراضيه تظهر لكل عضو بنسبه 21 نظام المهام المتغير بالرموز ايقونات منصات التواصل يوتيوب، تيك توك، فيسبوك تكون ثابته الواجهه اريد نظاما يربط الروابط بالرموز اليوميه؛ بحيث عندما يدخل العضو رمز المهمه اليومي ارقام يقوم النظام تلقاييا بفتح الرابط الجديد المرتبط بهذا الرمز قمت انا بتحديده مسبقا لوحه التحكم، ليقوم العضو برفع لقطه الشاشه وتضاف الارباح تلقاييا بحسب منصبه.لوحه التحكم للمشرف لوحه تحكم واحده سهله الاستخدام الموبايل تتيح التحكم الكامل حظر تعديل ارصده ونقاط شرف الاعضاء يدويا، ارسال المكافات، اضافه الرموز اليوميه وربط رمز برابط مهمه مختلف ومتجدد، وتعديل قيمه رسوم السحب ال 21 وتغيير مده ال 72 ساعه اي وقت بضغطه زر ملاحظه لدي فيديو لتسجيل الشاشه يوضح شكل القوايم والواجهات المطلوبه طبق الاصل، سارسله الشات الخاص للمبرمجين المهتمين للحفاظ علي الخصوصيه يرجي تقديم العرض السعر والمده برمجه تطوير البرمجيات برمجه مواقع برمجه قواعد البيانات unknown
full_description: مرحباً، أريد إنشاء موقع ويب للمهام اليومية يعتمد على باقات ومناصب محددة وهي (C1, C2, B1...) بربح يومي مخصص لكل منصب وبدون نظام إحالات داخلي.تفاصيل العمل المطلوبة:الشحن والسحب: تلقائي بالكامل (Automated Crypto) عبر ربط الموقع ببوابة دفع عملات رقمية لتقبل عملة USDT، ليتعرف النظام تلقائياً على وصول الأموال وتحديث الرصيد لشراء المناصب.قوانين السحب والرسوم: مدة السحب محددة (من 1 إلى 72 ساعة)، ورسوم خدمة السحب الافتراضية تظهر لكل عضو بنسبة 21%.نظام المهام المتغير بالرموز: أيقونات منصات التواصل (يوتيوب، تيك توك، فيسبوك) تكون ثابته في الواجهة. ولكن أريد نظاماً يربط الروابط بالرموز اليومية؛ بحيث عندما يدخل العضو رمز المهمة اليومي (6 أرقام)، يقوم النظام تلقائياً بفتح "الرابط الجديد" المرتبط بهذا الرمز والذي قمت أنا بتحديده مسبقاً من لوحة التحكم، ليقوم العضو برفع لقطة الشاشة وتضاف له الأرباح تلقائياً بحسب منصبه.لوحة التحكم للمشرف: لوحة تحكم واحدة سهلة الاستخدام من الموبايل تتيح لي التحكم الكامل بـ (حظر/تعديل أرصدة ونقاط شرف الأعضاء يدوياً، إرسال المكافآت، إضافة الرموز اليومية وربط كل رمز برابط مهمة مختلف ومتجدد، وتعديل قيمة رسوم السحب الـ 21% وتغيير مدة الـ 72 ساعة في أي وقت بضغطة زر).ملاحظة:لدي فيديو لتسجيل الشاشة يوضح شكل القوائم والواجهات المطلوبة طبق الأصل، سأرسله في الشات الخاص للمبرمجين المهتمين للحفاظ على الخصوصية. يرجى تقديم العرض مع السعر والمدة.
